Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorGroupsViewMixin); self.itemTemplate = "AuctionatorGroupsViewItemTemplate"; self.groupTemplate = "AuctionatorGroupsViewGroupTemplate"; self.groupInsetX = 0; self.clickEventName = "BagItemClicked"; self.completeEventName = "ViewComplete"; self.hideHiddenItems = false; self.itemTemplate = "AuctionatorGroupsViewItemTemplate"; self.groupTemplate = "AuctionatorSellingViewGroupTemplate"; self.clickEventName = "BagUse.BagItemClicked"; self.hideHiddenItems = true; self.applyVisibility = true; self:OnLoad()
